name: comfyui-arc-save
summary: Sign-on-arrival save node for ArcVelvetOS. POSTs the encoded image to the ArcVelvet arcIngest API and writes the C2PA-signed copy returned by the server. The unsigned bytes never touch disk. Prompt moderation runs server-side: prompts are scanned in-flight for minor-safety violations and discarded on pass; plaintext prompts never enter the public C2PA manifest unless you opt in.
